Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.name: Back Squat
Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.notes: Primary pyramid. 3 min rest before Set 4 and 5. Explosive drive out of the hole.

Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.name: Front Squat
Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.notes: Keep it light, focus on upright torso and deep range of motion.

Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.name: Romanian Deadlift
Day 1: Squat & Lower Body.notes: Strict hamstring stretch. Squeeze glutes at top.

Day 2: Bench Press & Push.name: Bench Press
Day 2: Bench Press & Push.notes: Primary pyramid. 3 min rest on heavy sets. Leg drive and tight lats on the unrack.

Day 2: Bench Press & Push.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
Day 2: Bench Press & Push.notes: Upper chest focus. Deep stretch at the bottom.

Day 2: Bench Press & Push.name: Dumbbell Flyes
Day 2: Bench Press & Push.notes: Strict form, focus on the stretch, no ego lifting.

Day 2: Bench Press & Push.name: Tricep Dips
Day 2: Bench Press & Push.notes: Add weight if you are hitting more than 15 reps.

Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.name: Conventional Deadlift
Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.notes: Primary pyramid. Pull the slack out of the bar before driving the floor away. 3 min rest for Set 5.

Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.name: Barbell Row
Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.notes: Heavy mid-back thickness. Keep torso parallel to the floor.

Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.notes: Strict form, no kipping. Full extension at the bottom.

Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.name: Face Pulls
Day 3: Deadlift & Pull.notes: Rear delt and rotator cuff health. Squeeze for a second at the top.

Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.name: Overhead Press
Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.notes: Primary pyramid. Squeeze glutes and brace core hard before pressing to protect the spine.

Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.notes: Slow and controlled. No swinging from the hips.

Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.name: Barbell Curl
Day 4: Overhead Press & Arms.notes: Bicep strength. Keep elbows pinned to your sides.
